entries.title: Have you ever wondered... Cats could talk
explanations: If cats could talk they would probably just ask for treats all day.
Dogs would drive to the park cats to sunny windowsills and hamsters would race.
Everyone would float around like astronauts and paper airplanes would never come down.
School morning routine would be wake up brush teeth and land in your classroom.

Happy thoughts would bring sunshine and laughter would create rainbows.
Every song would paint colors in the air and concerts would be rainbow explosions.
Dogs in sweaters cats in bow ties and bears in hats would be totally normal.

entries.title: What would happen if... Clouds were cotton candy

Walking would be bouncing and going upstairs would be the most fun ever.
You could pick a pepperoni pizza for dinner right from your backyard tree.
Your shadow would wave at you and play games when the sun was out.

explanations: We would climb tall ladders and take big fluffy bites from the sky.
Happy thoughts would bring sunshine and laughter would create rainbows.
Everyone would float around like astronauts and paper airplanes would never come down.
Every song would paint colors in the air and concerts would be rainbow explosions.
